_comment: TEMPLATE for @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime (srt). sandbox/launch-sandboxed GENERATES the live copy from autonomy.config.json into $HOME/.config/autonomy-loop/srt-settings.json (OUTSIDE the workspace, so the sandboxed agent cannot edit its own boundary: the Ona finding). This file is the human-readable reference shape; regenerate the live one with sandbox/srt-settings.gen.mjs, do not hand-widen. allowWrite is the workspace; denyWrite carves out the control plane (config + hooks/ + protectedPaths); allowedDomains is BOTH the egress allowlist AND the ceiling on the researcher web-fetch. A bare 'github.com' apex is intentionally NOT allowed (push/exfil surface); scope to api/lfs/codeload.
